zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire於大約1415年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特時，他的父親Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET33歲，母親Margaret Mallory24歲。他於大約1445年與Elizabeth de Hopton在英國英格蘭史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年6月8日在英國史洛普爾莫雷頓 可特享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire was born about 1415, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Mallory, was 24. He married Elizabeth de Hopton about 1445, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 June 1467, in Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire est né environ 1415, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mallory, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Hopton environ 1445, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1467, à Moreton Corbet, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshireが約1415年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで生まれた時，父Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBETは33歳，母Margaret Malloryは24歳であった。約1445年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットでElizabeth de Hoptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年6月8日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアモーエトン コルベットで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mallory(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 Elizabeth de Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 6월 8일 영국 슈럽실르 모레턴 코벳에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Corbet Sheriff of Shropshire родился около 1415 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert, Lord of Moreton CORBET было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mallory, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Hopton около 1445 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 июня 1467 г. в местности моретон корбет, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.
